headline: Did BD’s Earnings Shift, Portfolio Sale and New CFO Just Recast Becton Dickinson’s (BDX) Investment Narrative?
summary: In early May 2026, Becton, Dickinson and Company reported higher quarterly sales of US$4.71 billion but swung to a net loss, raised its full-year adjusted earnings guidance, completed the divestiture of its Biosciences & Diagnostic Solutions business, appointed long-time executive Vitor Roque as permanent CFO and executive vice president, and advanced new offerings and partnerships in medication management and vascular access. Beyond the headline earnings beat and guidance increase, BD’s...
